{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Karoshan commander
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Karoshan commander]] has one red organic eye and one blue cybernetic eye.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6">''The Captain'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|A [[Karoshan commander]] is using a wand authorized by the [[King Regent]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|“The King Regent authorized me to use this wand and granted me Aethertech for my hunt.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
